topic: Building trust before monetization in Indian EdTech
key_belief: Price is a trust signal in Tier 2 India. Affordability = solidarity, not low quality.
outcome: 10000 Cr valuation, 1.5 Cr students, zero sales pressure
contradicts_western: Western freemium and Byjus sales model
content: PW grew on YouTube trust before charging. 999/year price was a moral statement not a business decision. Zero ads, pure word of mouth. Proved community beats sales pressure.
